author: lOrm
content: Fixed in src/providers/google.rs::transform_response: tool-call ids derived from (ordinal, function_name) via new gemini_tool_call_id helper (call_0_bash / call_1_bash). Re-parsing same payload yields identical ids (tests: tool_call_ids_are_deterministic_across_reparses, repeated_function_calls_get_distinct_ordinal_ids). pipeline.rs and streaming.rs sites are in forbidden modules for this bulk task.
